title: gethealthapihealthcheck
description: Verify GET /health returns 200 response confirming service health when the backend service is running and reachable.

title: postapisettingsawssavecredentials
description: Verify POST /api/settings/aws saves encrypted AWS credentials successfully with valid JWT and valid request body, and returns 200 response.

title: postapivalidateawsvalidatecredentials
description: Verify POST /api/validate-aws validates AWS credentials using STS and returns 200 response for valid credentials.

title: postapigetdashboarddatafetchresources
description: Verify POST /api/get-dashboard-data returns 200 response with active resource and cost payload when provided valid AWS credentials.

title: getapidashboardsummaryfetchsummary
description: Verify GET /api/dashboard/summary returns 200 response with aggregated cost metrics and recommendation counts when authenticated.

title: getapiresourcesscannerscanresources
description: Verify GET /api/resources/scanner returns 200 response with scan results and optimization recommendations when authenticated.

title: getapiresourceshistoryfetchhistoricaldata
description: Verify GET /api/resources/history returns 200 response with historical cost trend data when authenticated.

title: postapiresourcesoptimizeapplyaction
description: Verify POST /api/resources/optimize/:id applies optimization action to specified resource and returns 200 response when authenticated and resource exists.
